# InboxRoute

InboxRoute is a fully managed AI-powered DM automation service for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, WhatsApp, and Telegram. We help service businesses automatically respond to direct messages, qualify leads, and book appointments 24/7 without any manual effort.

## What We Do
- Custom AI conversation workflows built for your business
- Instant 24/7 replies to DMs across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, WhatsApp, and Telegram
- Lead qualification and objection handling
- Automatic routing to your booking link or website
- Fully managed — no setup or ongoing management required

## Plans
- Starter: $199/month — single platform, unlimited DM conversations
- Standard: $299/month — advanced objection handling, multi-service management, bi-weekly reports
- Pro: $499/month — multi-platform, weekly strategy calls, booking system integration

## Industries Served
Professional services, fitness and wellness, real estate, beauty and salons, e-commerce, restaurants, education, B2B services

InboxRoute operates on fully compliant infrastructure across all supported platforms.
